tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Shining Star
Written by Leo Graham and Paul Richmond
Performed by The Manhattans (1980)

Capo 2

     [ch]A[/ch] x02220
[ch]A7sus4[/ch] x0223x
    [ch]A#[/ch] x13331
     [ch]C[/ch] x32010
     [ch]D[/ch] xx0232
    [ch]D#[/ch] x68886
    [ch]Em[/ch] 022000
     [ch]G[/ch] 320003
   [ch]G/B[/ch] x20003
    [ch]G#[/ch] 466544


Intro:

[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
     Ooh, yeah[/tab]

Chorus:

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Honey, you are my [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Shining star[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
Don't you go away[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Wanna be right here [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Where you are[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Until my dying day[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
Yeah, baby[/tab]


Verse 1:

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
So many have tried[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Tried to find[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
A love like yours and mine[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Girl, don't you realize[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
How you hypnotize[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]D[/ch]
You make me love you more each time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, baby[/tab]


Bridge:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]
Honey, I'll never [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] – [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
Leave you lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]
Give my love [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]
To you only[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus4[/ch]
To you only[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A#[/ch]  [ch]Asus4[/ch]
To you on - ly[/tab]


Repeat Chorus


Verse 2:

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Feels so good [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
When we're lying here [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Next to each other[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Lost in love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Baby, when we touch[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Love you so much[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]
You're all I ever dreamed of[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, baby[/tab]


Repeat Bridge (with final note up one half note)


Chorus 2: (With key change to D#)

[tab]       [ch]D#[/ch]         
Honey, you are my [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
Shining star[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#[/ch]
Don't you go away girl[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]
No, baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D#[/ch]
Wanna be right here [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
Where you are[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D#[/ch]
Until my dying day[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]
Mmm, hmm[/tab]


Tag:

[tab]       [ch]D#[/ch]
Honey, you are my [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
Shining star[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#[/ch]
Don't you go away girl[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G#[/ch]
Whoa, baby[/tab]


Repeat Tag (Fading)
